summary: Final stability check for iteration 12's hermetic-rewrite fix of test_teacher_can_move_student_batch. Ran `pytest tests/ -n auto` FIVE consecutive times: all 5 runs = 64/64 passed. The previously flaky test passed in 5/5 runs (0 failures). Deployment gate met.

target_test_verification.result: PASSED in ALL 5 runs (0 failures). Hermetic rewrite (own TEST_ FREE course + own batch + own registered student, teardown via finally: DELETE course) resolves the ~12% shared-state race from iteration_12.
target_test_verification.code_verified: L103-160 of test_iteration5_bugfix.py — no longer depends on student_token fixture, no portal_mode toggle, creates and cleans up its own resources.

critical_code_review_comments: The hermetic pattern in test_teacher_can_move_student_batch (unique TEST_ prefix + finally-based DELETE) is now consistent with test_move_batch_invalid_returns_error and is a solid template for future isolation-sensitive tests.
No portal_mode global toggles remain in this test — good.
test_credentials: Used seeded credentials: admin@rgpacademy.com/Admin@123, teacher@rgpacademy.com/Teacher@123. Test-created students use TEST_move_<uuid>@example.com pattern.
seed_data_creation: Test creates its own TEST_ course, batch, and student (all torn down via finally DELETE).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deployment gate met: 5 consecutive -n auto runs at 64/64. iteration_12 flake in test_teacher_can_move_student_batch is fully resolved by the hermetic rewrite. No further stability testing needed before deployment.
